Brazilian Cancer Registry (RHC) -- Survival Analysis

Hospital-based cancer registry data from INCA/SUS SISRHC. Analysis of 532,375 patients diagnosed primarily in 2014-2016 across 321 hospitals in all 27 Brazilian states.

Total Patients
532,375
With valid survival data
Deaths Observed
130,692
24.5% event rate
Cox Model C-index
0.783
Good discrimination
Hospitals
321
Across 27 states
Median Follow-up
126 d
Mean: 535 days

Analysis generated from RHC 2014 data. Survival times are from diagnosis date to death or last known contact. Censoring applied for patients without recorded death.
